title: The Only Isle
description: The Only Isle creates a compact, natural island world surrounded by an endless deep ocean, featuring a rich variety of dense biomes for players who enjoy the “limited world” experience. It offers a feel reminiscent of the legacy console editions!
body:
![An island !](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/323d6791dfe04adab84da8bdaebb870340f24b42.png)

# The only isle you will ever need.

The Only Isle turns Minecraft world creation into a compact island experience inspired by the old legacy console worlds. Pick an island size when creating a world and the Overworld becomes one natural central island with very dense biome diversity, surrounded by an endless deep ocean.

## Island Sizes

- `Very Small Isle`: around 32 chunks wide.
- `Small Isle`: around 54 chunks wide.
- `Medium Isle`: around 128 chunks wide.
- `Large Isle`: around 256 chunks wide.

## Compatibility

The Only Isle is built for Fabric. It **WAS** designed to work alongside performance-focused modpacks such as [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) and biome mods such as [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty). It is **HIGHLY** recommended to play with this mod for better biome diversity ! You can also use the world type AMPLIFIED which works super well with the mod !
